## Pull Request Template

### Description
Provide a concise summary of the changes and explain the objective rationale for the modification.

### Change Category
- [ ] Bug fix / Consistency alignment
- [ ] Heuristic addition (adhering to the 10-field format)
- [ ] Skill modification / addition
- [ ] Core Engine optimization

### Verification Checklist
- [ ] All modified Markdown files render correctly.
- [ ] No TODOs, placeholder text, or dead files are introduced.
- [ ] All cross-references use absolute file paths and resolve.
- [ ] Terminology is aligned with the 15-state lifecycle and 5-tier source hierarchy.
- [ ] Version numbers in file headers are updated.

### Test Scenarios
List the mock inputs and expected outputs used to verify this change.
```json
{
  "test_input": {},
  "expected_output": {}
}
```
